summary: LinguaConnect (HelloTalk clone) fully tested end-to-end. Backend: 10/10 pytest tests pass (8 existing API tests + 2 new WebSocket tests verifying valid-token connect + 'new_message' event delivery on partner POST). Frontend (Expo web preview, mobile viewport 390x800): Welcome → Login → Connect tab works; Registration + 3-step onboarding → Connect works; Connect tab partner cards visible, search by name & language filter chip both work; partner-card tap opens user-profile-screen with working Send Message → chat screen; chat send works, grammar-check-btn produces correction-card with corrected text and correction-apply-btn replaces input draft (verified 'I has went to store' → 'He ido a la tienda.'); Moments tab shows seeded posts, like toggle is optimistic (0↔1), FAB composer publishes and post appears, moment detail comment send works; Profile tab edit → bio save → logout → returns to welcome all work. RN deprecation warnings detected in console: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow) and props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents) — multiple occurrences across screens.

issues: Bottom tab buttons (Connect/Chats/Moments/Me) have no testID — only role-based / icon-based selection works. Add tabBarButtonTestID via Tabs.Screen options for stable E2E targeting.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' — appears on Welcome, Connect and other screens that use elevation/shadow styling. Need to migrate StyleSheet entries to boxShadow (web) or platform-split via Platform.select.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Migrate any <View pointerEvents="..." /> usages to style={{ pointerEvents: '...' }}.

action_items: Optional: add tabBarButtonTestID (e.g. 'tab-connect','tab-chats','tab-moments','tab-profile') in app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx so test scripts can target tabs without role lookup.
Replace deprecated RN style props: 'shadow*' → boxShadow / Platform.select; remove <View pointerEvents=...> in favor of style.pointerEvents to silence runtime warnings.
Doc nit: review request mentioned testID 'chat-item-{id}' but code uses 'chat-row-{id}' (also chat-unread-{id} for badge). Either update the spec or rename testIDs for consistency.
Doc nit: review request mentions onboarding-level-{level} (capitalized like 'Beginner') but code uses lowercase ('onboarding-level-beginner', etc.). Align spec or code.
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket endpoint at server.py:46 uses query-param token (?token=) — works, but consider adding handshake header support too. Currently OK for Expo web client.

auth/register stores password_hash directly in user doc, but Mongo unique-index on email is required for the DuplicateKeyError path to trigger. Verified working via test_register_login_me (duplicate returns 400).

Profile edit button at app/(tabs)/profile.tsx:71 is a toggle (edit ↔ save) reusing the same testID 'profile-edit-btn'. This works but is unconventional; consider a separate 'profile-save-btn' testID when in edit mode for clearer test semantics.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all targeted flows (welcome/login, register+onboarding, connect search/filter, partner profile, chat send + grammar-check + apply, moments feed/like/compose/comment, profile edit/bio save/logout)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data; relied on existing seed (demo@demo.com, mei@demo.com, etc.). Earlier WS test created a 'ws hello from mei' message in demo↔mei conversation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend WS tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_websocket.py and require pytest-asyncio + websockets (already installed). Frontend tabs lack testIDs — use direct expo-router URL navigation (/chats, /profile, /moments) or get_by_role('button', name='Chats') (may flake on web tab bar). Chat list uses 'chat-row-{id}' / 'chat-unread-{id}', not 'chat-item-{id}'. Onboarding level testIDs are lowercase. AI endpoints (/api/ai/translate, /api/ai/correct) call GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key — allow 5–10s per call; one earlier 'budget exceeded' transient was observed in agent notes but did not reproduce in this run.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no defects blocking release. Two non-blocking RN web deprecation warnings reported as action items. Documentation/testID naming nits documented for main agent to reconcile.
